scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/core build && bun run --cwd packages/ui build && bun run --cwd packages/server build
scripts.build:web: bun build apps/web/src/main.ts --outdir apps/web/dist --minify && bun build packages/ui/src/index.ts --outfile apps/web/dist/components.js --minify && cp apps/web/index.html apps/web/dist/index.html
